# noahgift.com link audit fixture
#
# Each entry: [expected_substring](url)
# Probar renders <url> in headless Chrome, waits for hydration, then asserts
# that <expected_substring> appears (case-insensitive, normalized) in either
# document.title or document.body.innerText. This catches the spec-012 P0
# class of bug where a CMS returns 200 with a soft-404 / wrong-content page.
